page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: JOUR3281 or JOUR343.

Formerly: JOUR328I.

JOUR347 News Videography (3 Credits)

Introduction to shooting, editing and production of video stories for broadcast and the Web; includes newsgathering in the field. Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in JOUR201.

Jointly offered with: JOUR603.

Restriction: Permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism. Credit Only Granted for. JOUR262, JOUR347 or JOUR603.
